info.name: EHR Patient API
info.description: Postman collection for the EHR Patient API endpoints

request.description: Returns a single patient by their ID
Returns a patient by their email address
Returns a patient by their Medical Record Number
Search patients by first or last name
Returns all patients who have given telehealth consent

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "phoneNumber": "555-123-4567",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-15",
  "gender": "MALE",
  "addressLine1": "123 Main St",
  "addressLine2": "Apt 4B",
  "city": "Kalispell",
  "state": "MT",
  "zipCode": "59901",
  "country": "USA",
  "medicalRecordNumber": "MRN-001",
  "bloodType": "O_POSITIVE",
  "allergies": "Penicillin, Peanuts",
  "currentMedications": "Lisinopril 10mg",
  "medicalHistory": "Hypertension diagnosed 2018",
  "notes": "Prefers morning appointments",
  "insuranceProvider": "Blue Cross Blue Shield",
  "insurancePolicyNumber": "BCBS-987654",
  "insuranceGroupNumber": "GRP-001",
  "emergencyContactName": "Jane Doe",
  "emergencyContactPhone": "555-987-6543",
  "emergencyContactRelationship": "Spouse",
  "telehealthConsent": true,
  "preferredVideoProvider": "Zoom",
  "appointmentPreference": "TELEHEALTH",
  "active": true
}

{

request.description: Updates an existing patient by ID
Soft deletes a patient by setting active to false
